latest--resourceoverrides-1.300.0

shared
Type object
Schema URL https://catalog.lintel.tools/schemas/schemastore/cics-ts-resource-overrides/_shared/latest--resourceoverrides-1.300.0.json
Parent schema cics-ts-resource-overrides
Type: object

Schema that describes the structure of a CICS resource overrides document.

Properties

schemaVersion string required

Specify the resource overrides schema version.

Values: "resourceOverrides/1.300"
resourceOverrides array | null required

Resources to be overridden are list items after the resourceOverrides mapping.

Definitions

resourcetypes array | null

Resources to be overridden are list items after the resourceOverrides mapping.

atomserviceSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS ATOMSERVICE resources type.

atomserviceSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of ATOMSERVICE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | atomserviceSelectorNameAttribute

ATOMSERVICE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | atomserviceSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomtype string | atomserviceSelectorAtomtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: FEED | SERVICE | COLLECTION | CATEGORY.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorAtomtypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bindfile string | atomserviceSelectorBindfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorBindfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
configfile string | atomserviceSelectorConfigfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resourcename string | atomserviceSelectorResourcenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorResourcenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resourcetype string | atomserviceSelectorResourcetypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TSQUEUE | FILE | PROGRAM.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorResourcetypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | atomserviceSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, atomserviceSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorAtomtypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorBindfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorResourcenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorResourcetypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

atomtype string | atomserviceOverrideAtomtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: FEED | SERVICE | COLLECTION | CATEGORY.

One of: string string, atomserviceOverrideAtomtypeAttribute object[]
bindfile string | string | atomserviceOverrideBindfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, atomserviceOverrideBindfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
configfile string | string | atomserviceOverrideConfigfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, atomserviceOverrideConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resourcename string | string | atomserviceOverrideResourcenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, atomserviceOverrideResourcenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resourcetype string | atomserviceOverrideResourcetypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TSQUEUE | FILE | PROGRAM.

One of: string string, atomserviceOverrideResourcetypeAttribute object[]
status string | atomserviceOverrideStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, atomserviceOverrideStatusAttribute object[]
atomserviceOverrideAtomtypeAttribute object[]
atomserviceOverrideBindfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceOverrideConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceOverrideResourcenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomserviceOverrideResourcetypeAttribute object[]
atomserviceOverrideStatusAttribute object[]
bundleSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS BUNDLE resources type.

bundleSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of BUNDLE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | bundleSelectorNameAttribute

BUNDLE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, bundleSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | bundleSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, bundleSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
basescope string | bundleSelectorBasescopeAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, bundleSelectorBasescopeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bundledir string | bundleSelectorBundledirAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, bundleSelectorBundledirAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | bundleSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, bundleSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]

bundleSelectorBundledirAttribute object | object | object | object[]

bundleSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bundleOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

basescope string | string | bundleOverrideBasescopeAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, bundleOverrideBasescopeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bundledir string | string | bundleOverrideBundledirAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, bundleOverrideBundledirAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | bundleOverrideStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

connectionSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS CONNECTION resources type.

connectionSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of CONNECTION resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | connectionSelectorNameAttribute

CONNECTION resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | connectionSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
accessmethod string | connectionSelectorAccessmethodAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: VTAM | IRC | INDIRECT | XM.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorAccessmethodAttribute object | object | object | object[]
attachsec string | connectionSelectorAttachsecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | IDENTIFY | VERIFY | PERSISTENT | MIXIDPE.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorAttachsecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
autoconnect string | connectionSelectorAutoconnectAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ALL.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorAutoconnectAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bindsecurity string | connectionSelectorBindsecurityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, connectionSelectorBindsecurityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
conntype string | connectionSelectorConntypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: GENERIC | SPECIFIC.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorConntypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
datastream string | connectionSelectorDatastreamAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USER | 3270 | SCS | STRFIELD | LMS.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorDatastreamAttribute object | object | object | object[]
indsys string | connectionSelectorIndsysAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorIndsysAttribute object | object | object | object[]
inservice string | connectionSelectorInserviceAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, connectionSelectorInserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maxqtime integer | string | connectionSelectorMaxqtimeAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, connectionSelectorMaxqtimeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
netname string | connectionSelectorNetnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorNetnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
protocol string | connectionSelectorProtocolAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: APPC | LU61 | EXCI.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorProtocolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
psrecovery string | connectionSelectorPsrecoveryAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SYSDEFAULT | NONE.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorPsrecoveryAttribute object | object | object | object[]
queuelimit integer | string | connectionSelectorQueuelimitAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, connectionSelectorQueuelimitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
recordformat string | connectionSelectorRecordformatAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: U | VB.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorRecordformatAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotename string | connectionSelectorRemotenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorRemotenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesysnet string | connectionSelectorRemotesysnetAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorRemotesysnetAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesystem string | connectionSelectorRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]
securityname string | connectionSelectorSecuritynameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorSecuritynameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
singlesess string | connectionSelectorSinglesessAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, connectionSelectorSinglesessAttribute object | object | object | object[]
usedfltuser string | connectionSelectorUsedfltuserAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, connectionSelectorUsedfltuserAttribute object | object | object | object[]
xlnaction string | connectionSelectorXlnactionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: KEEP | FORCE.

One of: string string, connectionSelectorXlnactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

accessmethod string | connectionOverrideAccessmethodAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: VTAM | IRC | INDIRECT | XM.

One of: string string, connectionOverrideAccessmethodAttribute object[]
attachsec string | connectionOverrideAttachsecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | IDENTIFY | VERIFY | PERSISTENT | MIXIDPE.

One of: string string, connectionOverrideAttachsecAttribute object[]

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ALL.

One of: string string, connectionOverrideConntypeAttribute object[]

Specify a value from the following list: USER | 3270 | SCS | STRFIELD | LMS.

One of: string string, connectionOverrideDatastreamAttribute object[]
indsys string | string | connectionOverrideIndsysAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, connectionOverrideIndsysAttribute object | object | object | object[]
inservice string | connectionOverrideInserviceAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, connectionOverrideInserviceAttribute object[]
maxqtime integer | string | connectionOverrideMaxqtimeAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, connectionOverrideMaxqtimeAttribute object[]
netname string | string | connectionOverrideNetnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, connectionOverrideNetnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
protocol string | connectionOverrideProtocolAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: APPC | LU61 | EXCI.

psrecovery string | connectionOverridePsrecoveryAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SYSDEFAULT | NONE.

One of: string string, connectionOverridePsrecoveryAttribute object[]

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

Specify a value from the following list: U | VB.

remotename string | string | connectionOverrideRemotenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

db2connSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS DB2CONN resources type.

db2connSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of DB2CONN resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | db2connSelectorNameAttribute

DB2CONN resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | db2connSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
accountrec string | db2connSelectorAccountrecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TXID | TASK | UOW.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorAccountrecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authid string | db2connSelectorAuthidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorAuthidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authtype string | string | db2connSelectorAuthtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, db2connSelectorAuthtypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
comauthid string | db2connSelectorComauthidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorComauthidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
comauthtype string | string | db2connSelectorComauthtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, db2connSelectorComauthtypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
comthreadlim integer | db2connSelectorComthreadlimAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

One of: integer integer, db2connSelectorComthreadlimAttribute object | object | object | object[]
connecterror string | db2connSelectorConnecterrorAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SQLCODE | ABEND.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorConnecterrorAttribute object | object | object | object[]
db2groupid string | db2connSelectorDb2groupidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorDb2groupidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
db2id string | db2connSelectorDb2idAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorDb2idAttribute object | object | object | object[]
drollback string | db2connSelectorDrollbackAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, db2connSelectorDrollbackAttribute object | object | object | object[]
msgqueue1 string | db2connSelectorMsgqueue1Attribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorMsgqueue1Attribute object | object | object | object[]
msgqueue2 string | db2connSelectorMsgqueue2Attribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorMsgqueue2Attribute object | object | object | object[]
msgqueue3 string | db2connSelectorMsgqueue3Attribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorMsgqueue3Attribute object | object | object | object[]
nontermrel string | db2connSelectorNontermrelAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, db2connSelectorNontermrelAttribute object | object | object | object[]
plan string | db2connSelectorPlanAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorPlanAttribute object | object | object | object[]
planexitname string | db2connSelectorPlanexitnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorPlanexitnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
priority string | db2connSelectorPriorityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: HIGH | EQUAL | LOW.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorPriorityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
purgecycle string | db2connSelectorPurgecycleAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 59 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorPurgecycleAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resyncmember string | db2connSelectorResyncmemberAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, db2connSelectorResyncmemberAttribute object | object | object | object[]
reuselimit integer | db2connSelectorReuselimitAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 10000.

One of: integer integer, db2connSelectorReuselimitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
signid string | db2connSelectorSignidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorSignidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
standbymode string | db2connSelectorStandbymodeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: RECONNECT | CONNECT | NOCONNECT.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorStandbymodeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
statsqueue string | db2connSelectorStatsqueueAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorStatsqueueAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tcblimit integer | db2connSelectorTcblimitAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 4 to 2000.

One of: integer integer, db2connSelectorTcblimitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
threaderror string | db2connSelectorThreaderrorAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: N906D | N906 | ABEND.

One of: string string, db2connSelectorThreaderrorAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a integer in the range 3 to 2000.

threadwait string | db2connSelectorThreadwaitAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

db2connOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

accountrec string | db2connOverrideAccountrecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TXID | TASK | UOW.

One of: string string, db2connOverrideAccountrecAttribute object[]
authid string | string | db2connOverrideAuthidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideAuthidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authtype string | string | db2connOverrideAuthtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideAuthtypeAttribute object[]
comauthid string | string | db2connOverrideComauthidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideComauthidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
comauthtype string | string | db2connOverrideComauthtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideComauthtypeAttribute object[]

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

One of: integer integer, db2connOverrideComthreadlimAttribute object[]
connecterror string | db2connOverrideConnecterrorAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SQLCODE | ABEND.

One of: string string, db2connOverrideConnecterrorAttribute object[]
db2groupid string | string | db2connOverrideDb2groupidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideDb2groupidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
db2id string | string | db2connOverrideDb2idAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverrideDb2idAttribute object | object | object | object[]

msgqueue3 string | string | db2connOverrideMsgqueue3Attribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

nontermrel string | db2connOverrideNontermrelAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

plan string | string | db2connOverridePlanAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverridePlanAttribute object | object | object | object[]
planexitname string | string | db2connOverridePlanexitnameAttribute

One of: string string, string string, db2connOverridePlanexitnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a value from the following list: HIGH | EQUAL | LOW.

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 59 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

db2entrySelectorOverrides object[]

CICS DB2ENTRY resources type.

db2entrySelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of DB2ENTRY resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | db2entrySelectorNameAttribute

DB2ENTRY resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | db2entrySelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
accountrec string | db2entrySelectorAccountrecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TXID | TASK | UOW.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorAccountrecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authid string | db2entrySelectorAuthidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorAuthidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authtype string | db2entrySelectorAuthtypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USERID | OPID | GROUP | SIGN | TERM | TX.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorAuthtypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
drollback string | db2entrySelectorDrollbackAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorDrollbackAttribute object | object | object | object[]
plan string | db2entrySelectorPlanAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorPlanAttribute object | object | object | object[]
planexitname string | db2entrySelectorPlanexitnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorPlanexitnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
priority string | db2entrySelectorPriorityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: HIGH | EQUAL | LOW.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorPriorityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
protectnum integer | db2entrySelectorProtectnumAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

One of: integer integer, db2entrySelectorProtectnumAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sharelocks string | db2entrySelectorSharelocksAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorSharelocksAttribute object | object | object | object[]
threadlimit integer | db2entrySelectorThreadlimitAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 2000.

One of: integer integer, db2entrySelectorThreadlimitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
threadwait string | db2entrySelectorThreadwaitAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: POOL | "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorThreadwaitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
transid string | db2entrySelectorTransidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>+]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2entrySelectorTransidAttribute object | object | object | object[]

db2tranSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of DB2TRAN resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | db2tranSelectorNameAttribute

DB2TRAN resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

group string | db2tranSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

entry string | db2tranSelectorEntryAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, db2tranSelectorEntryAttribute object | object | object | object[]
transid string | db2tranSelectorTransidAttribute

doctemplateSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of DOCTEMPLATE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | doctemplateSelectorNameAttribute

DOCTEMPLATE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | doctemplateSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
appendcrlf string | doctemplateSelectorAppendcrlfAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorAppendcrlfAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ddname string | doctemplateSelectorDdnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorDdnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
exitpgm string | doctemplateSelectorExitpgmAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorExitpgmAttribute object | object | object | object[]
file string | doctemplateSelectorFileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorFileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
hfsfile string | doctemplateSelectorHfsfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorHfsfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
membername string | doctemplateSelectorMembernameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorMembernameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
program string | doctemplateSelectorProgramAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorProgramAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tdqueue string | doctemplateSelectorTdqueueAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorTdqueueAttribute object | object | object | object[]
templatename string | doctemplateSelectorTemplatenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 48 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorTemplatenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tsqueue string | doctemplateSelectorTsqueueAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorTsqueueAttribute object | object | object | object[]
type string | doctemplateSelectorTypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BINARY | EBCDIC.

One of: string string, doctemplateSelectorTypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]

doctemplateOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

appendcrlf string | doctemplateOverrideAppendcrlfAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, doctemplateOverrideAppendcrlfAttribute object[]
ddname string | string | doctemplateOverrideDdnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideDdnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
exitpgm string | string | doctemplateOverrideExitpgmAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideExitpgmAttribute object | object | object | object[]
file string | string | doctemplateOverrideFileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideFileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
hfsfile string | string | doctemplateOverrideHfsfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideHfsfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
membername string | string | doctemplateOverrideMembernameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideMembernameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
program string | string | doctemplateOverrideProgramAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideProgramAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tdqueue string | string | doctemplateOverrideTdqueueAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideTdqueueAttribute object | object | object | object[]
templatename string | string | doctemplateOverrideTemplatenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 48 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideTemplatenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tsqueue string | string | doctemplateOverrideTsqueueAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, doctemplateOverrideTsqueueAttribute object | object | object | object[]
type string | doctemplateOverrideTypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BINARY | EBCDIC.

One of: string string, doctemplateOverrideTypeAttribute object[]

dumpcodeSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS DUMPCODE resources type.

dumpcodeSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of DUMPCODE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | dumpcodeSelectorNameAttribute

DUMPCODE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | dumpcodeSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
daeoption string | dumpcodeSelectorDaeoptionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: DAE | NODAE.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorDaeoptionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dsplist string | dumpcodeSelectorDsplistAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorDsplistAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dumpaction string | dumpcodeSelectorDumpactionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TRANDUMP | SYSDUMP | BOTH | NONE.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorDumpactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dumpscope string | dumpcodeSelectorDumpscopeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | RELATED.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorDumpscopeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
joblist string | dumpcodeSelectorJoblistAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 134 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorJoblistAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maximum integer | dumpcodeSelectorMaximumAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 999.

One of: integer integer, dumpcodeSelectorMaximumAttribute object | object | object | object[]
shutoption string | dumpcodeSelectorShutoptionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NOSHUTDOWN | SHUTDOWN.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorShutoptionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
type string | dumpcodeSelectorTypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TRAN | SYSTEM.

One of: string string, dumpcodeSelectorTypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]

enqmodelSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of ENQMODEL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | enqmodelSelectorNameAttribute

ENQMODEL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, enqmodelSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | enqmodelSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

enqname string | enqmodelSelectorEnqnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, enqmodelSelectorEnqnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
enqscope string | enqmodelSelectorEnqscopeAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

status string | enqmodelSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

CICS FILE resources type.

fileSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of FILE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | fileSelectorNameAttribute

FILE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, fileSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | fileSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, fileSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
add string | fileSelectorAddAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileSelectorAddAttribute object | object | object | object[]
backuptype string | fileSelectorBackuptypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: STATIC | DYNAMIC.

One of: string string, fileSelectorBackuptypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
browse string | fileSelectorBrowseAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileSelectorBrowseAttribute object | object | object | object[]
cfdtpool string | fileSelectorCfdtpoolAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, fileSelectorCfdtpoolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
databuffers integer | fileSelectorDatabuffersAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 2 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, fileSelectorDatabuffersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
delete string | fileSelectorDeleteAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileSelectorDeleteAttribute object | object | object | object[]
disposition string | fileSelectorDispositionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SHARE | OLD.

One of: string string, fileSelectorDispositionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dsname string | fileSelectorDsnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 44 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#&.-%]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, fileSelectorDsnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dsnsharing string | fileSelectorDsnsharingAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ALLREQS | MODIFYREQS.

One of: string string, fileSelectorDsnsharingAttribute object | object | object | object[]
fwdrecovlog integer | string | fileSelectorFwdrecovlogAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 99.

indexbuffers integer | fileSelectorIndexbuffersAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, fileSelectorIndexbuffersAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | BEFORE | AFTER | ALL.

One of: string string, fileSelectorJnladdAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jnlread string | fileSelectorJnlreadAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | UPDATEONLY | READONLY | ALL.

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileSelectorJnlsyncreadAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jnlsyncwrite string | fileSelectorJnlsyncwriteAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, fileSelectorJnlsyncwriteAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jnlupdate string | fileSelectorJnlupdateAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileSelectorJnlupdateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
journal integer | string | fileSelectorJournalAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 99.

One of: integer integer, string string, fileSelectorJournalAttribute object | object | object | object[]
keylength integer | fileSelectorKeylengthAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 255.

One of: integer integer, fileSelectorKeylengthAttribute object | object | object | object[]
load string | fileSelectorLoadAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

nsrgroup string | fileSelectorNsrgroupAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | BACKOUTONLY | ALL.

remotename string | fileSelectorRemotenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

remotesystem string | fileSelectorRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, fileOverrideLoadAttribute object[]
lsrpoolnum integer | fileOverrideLsrpoolnumAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 255.

One of: integer integer, fileOverrideLsrpoolnumAttribute object[]
maxnumrecs integer | string | fileOverrideMaxnumrecsAttribute

Specify either the string "NOLIMIT" or a single integer in the range 1 to 99999999.

One of: integer integer, string string, fileOverrideMaxnumrecsAttribute object[]
nsrgroup string | string | fileOverrideNsrgroupAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, fileOverrideNsrgroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
opentime string | fileOverrideOpentimeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: FIRSTREF | STARTUP.

One of: string string, fileOverrideOpentimeAttribute object[]
read string | fileOverrideReadAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, fileOverrideReadAttribute object[]
readinteg string | fileOverrideReadintegAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: UNCOMMITTED | CONSISTENT | REPEATABLE.

One of: string string, fileOverrideReadintegAttribute object[]
recordformat string | fileOverrideRecordformatAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: V | F.

One of: string string, fileOverrideRecordformatAttribute object[]
recordsize integer | fileOverrideRecordsizeAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, fileOverrideRecordsizeAttribute object[]
recovery string | fileOverrideRecoveryAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | BACKOUTONLY | ALL.

One of: string string, fileOverrideRecoveryAttribute object[]
remotename string | string | fileOverrideRemotenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, fileOverrideRemotenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesystem string | string | fileOverrideRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, fileOverrideRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]
rlsaccess string | fileOverrideRlsaccessAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, fileOverrideRlsaccessAttribute object[]
status string | fileOverrideStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED | UNENABLED.

One of: string string, fileOverrideStatusAttribute object[]
strings integer | fileOverrideStringsAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 255.

One of: integer integer, fileOverrideStringsAttribute object[]

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | CICS | USER | CF.

One of: string string, fileOverrideTableAttribute object[]

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

ipconnSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS IPCONN resources type.

ipconnSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of IPCONN resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | ipconnSelectorNameAttribute

IPCONN resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | ipconnSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
applid string | ipconnSelectorApplidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorApplidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
autoconnect string | ipconnSelectorAutoconnectAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorAutoconnectAttribute object | object | object | object[]
certificate string | ipconnSelectorCertificateAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorCertificateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ciphers string | ipconnSelectorCiphersAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorCiphersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ha string | ipconnSelectorHaAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorHaAttribute object | object | object | object[]
host string | ipconnSelectorHostAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 116 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorHostAttribute object | object | object | object[]
idprop string | ipconnSelectorIdpropAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NOTALLOWED | OPTIONAL | REQUIRED.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorIdpropAttribute object | object | object | object[]
inservice string | ipconnSelectorInserviceAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorInserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
linkauth string | ipconnSelectorLinkauthAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SECUSER | CERTUSER.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorLinkauthAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maxqtime integer | string | ipconnSelectorMaxqtimeAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, ipconnSelectorMaxqtimeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mirrorlife string | ipconnSelectorMirrorlifeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: REQUEST | TASK | UOW.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorMirrorlifeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
networkid string | ipconnSelectorNetworkidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorNetworkidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
port integer | string | ipconnSelectorPortAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 65535.

One of: integer integer, string string, ipconnSelectorPortAttribute object | object | object | object[]
queuelimit integer | string | ipconnSelectorQueuelimitAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, ipconnSelectorQueuelimitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
receivecount integer | ipconnSelectorReceivecountAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 999.

One of: integer integer, ipconnSelectorReceivecountAttribute object | object | object | object[]
securityname string | ipconnSelectorSecuritynameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorSecuritynameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sendcount integer | ipconnSelectorSendcountAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 999.

One of: integer integer, ipconnSelectorSendcountAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ssl string | ipconnSelectorSslAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ATTLSAWARE.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorSslAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tcpipservice string | ipconnSelectorTcpipserviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorTcpipserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
userauth string | ipconnSelectorUserauthAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | IDENTIFY | VERIFY | DEFAULTUSER.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorUserauthAttribute object | object | object | object[]
xlnaction string | ipconnSelectorXlnactionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: KEEP | FORCE.

One of: string string, ipconnSelectorXlnactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]

journalmodelSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of JOURNALMODEL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | journalmodelSelectorNameAttribute

JOURNALMODEL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, journalmodelSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | journalmodelSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, journalmodelSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
journalname string | journalmodelSelectorJournalnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#+%]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, journalmodelSelectorJournalnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
streamname string | journalmodelSelectorStreamnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 26 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#&.-]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, journalmodelSelectorStreamnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
type string | journalmodelSelectorTypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: MVS | SMF | DUMMY.

libraryOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

critical string | libraryOverrideCriticalAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, libraryOverrideCriticalAttribute object[]
dsname01 string | string | libraryOverrideDsname01Attribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 44 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#.-]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, libraryOverrideDsname01Attribute object | object | object | object[]
dsname02 string | string | libraryOverrideDsname02Attribute

lsrpoolSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS LSRPOOL resources type.

lsrpoolSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of LSRPOOL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | lsrpoolSelectorNameAttribute

LSRPOOL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, lsrpoolSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | lsrpoolSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, lsrpoolSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
data12k integer | lsrpoolSelectorData12kAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 3 to 32767.

mapsetSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS MAPSET resources type.

mapsetSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of MAPSET resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | mapsetSelectorNameAttribute

MAPSET resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | mapsetSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resident string | mapsetSelectorResidentAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorResidentAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | mapsetSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
usage string | mapsetSelectorUsageAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NORMAL | TRANSIENT.

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorUsageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
uselpacopy string | mapsetSelectorUselpacopyAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, mapsetSelectorUselpacopyAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mapsetSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mapsetSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mapsetSelectorResidentAttribute object | object | object | object[]

mapsetSelectorUsageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mapsetSelectorUselpacopyAttribute object | object | object | object[]

CICS MQCONN resources type.

mqconnSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of MQCONN resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | mqconnSelectorNameAttribute

MQCONN resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mqconnSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | mqconnSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mqconnSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
initqname string | mqconnSelectorInitqnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 48 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mqconnSelectorInitqnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mqname string | mqconnSelectorMqnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, mqconnSelectorMqnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resyncmember string | mqconnSelectorResyncmemberAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO" | GROUPRESYNC.

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

initqname string | string | mqconnOverrideInitqnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 48 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, mqconnOverrideInitqnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mqname string | string | mqconnOverrideMqnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, mqconnOverrideMqnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO" | GROUPRESYNC.

One of: string string, mqconnOverrideResyncmemberAttribute object[]

CICS PIPELINE resources type.

pipelineSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of PIPELINE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | pipelineSelectorNameAttribute

PIPELINE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | pipelineSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
configfile string | pipelineSelectorConfigfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
respwait integer | string | pipelineSelectorRespwaitAttribute

Specify either the string "DEFT" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, pipelineSelectorRespwaitAttribute object | object | object | object[]
shelf string | pipelineSelectorShelfAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorShelfAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | pipelineSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
wsdir string | pipelineSelectorWsdirAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, pipelineSelectorWsdirAttribute object | object | object | object[]

pipelineOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

configfile string | string | pipelineOverrideConfigfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, pipelineOverrideConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
respwait integer | string | pipelineOverrideRespwaitAttribute

Specify either the string "DEFT" or a single integer in the range 0 to 9999.

One of: integer integer, string string, pipelineOverrideRespwaitAttribute object[]
shelf string | string | pipelineOverrideShelfAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, pipelineOverrideShelfAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | pipelineOverrideStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, pipelineOverrideStatusAttribute object[]
wsdir string | string | pipelineOverrideWsdirAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, pipelineOverrideWsdirAttribute object | object | object | object[]
pipelineOverrideConfigfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
pipelineOverrideRespwaitAttribute object[]
pipelineOverrideShelfAttribute object | object | object | object[]

CICS PROCESSTYPE resources type.

processtypeSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of PROCESSTYPE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | processtypeSelectorNameAttribute

PROCESSTYPE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | processtypeSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
auditlevel string | processtypeSelectorAuditlevelAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: OFF | PROCESS | ACTIVITY | FULL.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorAuditlevelAttribute object | object | object | object[]
auditlog string | processtypeSelectorAuditlogAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorAuditlogAttribute object | object | object | object[]
file string | processtypeSelectorFileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorFileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | processtypeSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, processtypeSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.
