CICS PROFILE resources type.

profileSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of PROFILE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | profileSelectorNameAttribute

PROFILE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, profileSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | profileSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, profileSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
chaincontrol string | profileSelectorChaincontrolAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorChaincontrolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dvsuprt string | profileSelectorDvsuprtAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ALL | NONVTAM | VTAM.

One of: string string, profileSelectorDvsuprtAttribute object | object | object | object[]
facilitylike string | profileSelectorFacilitylikeAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, profileSelectorFacilitylikeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
inbfmh string | profileSelectorInbfmhAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | ALL | DIP | EODS.

One of: string string, profileSelectorInbfmhAttribute object | object | object | object[]
journal integer | string | profileSelectorJournalAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 99.

One of: integer integer, string string, profileSelectorJournalAttribute object | object | object | object[]
logrec string | profileSelectorLogrecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorLogrecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
modename string | profileSelectorModenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, profileSelectorModenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
msginteg string | profileSelectorMsgintegAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorMsgintegAttribute object | object | object | object[]
msgjrnl string | profileSelectorMsgjrnlAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | INPUT | OUTPUT | INOUT.

One of: string string, profileSelectorMsgjrnlAttribute object | object | object | object[]
nepclass integer | profileSelectorNepclassAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

One of: integer integer, profileSelectorNepclassAttribute object | object | object | object[]
onewte string | profileSelectorOnewteAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorOnewteAttribute object | object | object | object[]
printercomp string | profileSelectorPrintercompAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorPrintercompAttribute object | object | object | object[]
raq string | profileSelectorRaqAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, profileSelectorRaqAttribute object | object | object | object[]
rtimout integer | string | profileSelectorRtimoutAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a time interval (format mmss) in the range 1 to 7000.

One of: integer integer, string string, profileSelectorRtimoutAttribute object | object | object | object[]
scrnsize string | profileSelectorScrnsizeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: DEFAULT | ALTERNATE.

One of: string string, profileSelectorScrnsizeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
uctran string | profileSelectorUctranAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

CICS PROGRAM resources type.

programSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of PROGRAM resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | programSelectorNameAttribute

PROGRAM resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | programSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
api string | programSelectorApiAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: CICSAPI | OPENAPI.

One of: string string, programSelectorApiAttribute object | object | object | object[]
cedf string | programSelectorCedfAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, programSelectorCedfAttribute object | object | object | object[]
concurrency string | programSelectorConcurrencyAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: QUASIRENT | THREADSAFE | REQUIRED.

One of: string string, programSelectorConcurrencyAttribute object | object | object | object[]
datalocation string | programSelectorDatalocationAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BELOW | ANY.

One of: string string, programSelectorDatalocationAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dynamic string | programSelectorDynamicAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, programSelectorDynamicAttribute object | object | object | object[]
execkey string | programSelectorExeckeyAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: USER | CICS.

One of: string string, programSelectorExeckeyAttribute object | object | object | object[]
executionset string | programSelectorExecutionsetAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: FULLAPI | DPLSUBSET.

One of: string string, programSelectorExecutionsetAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jvm string | programSelectorJvmAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, programSelectorJvmAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jvmclass string | programSelectorJvmclassAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorJvmclassAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jvmserver string | programSelectorJvmserverAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorJvmserverAttribute object | object | object | object[]
language string | programSelectorLanguageAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: COBOL | ASSEMBLER | LE370 | C | PLI.

One of: string string, programSelectorLanguageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
reload string | programSelectorReloadAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, programSelectorReloadAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotename string | programSelectorRemotenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorRemotenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesystem string | programSelectorRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]
resident string | programSelectorResidentAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, programSelectorResidentAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | programSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, programSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
transid string | programSelectorTransidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, programSelectorTransidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
usage string | programSelectorUsageAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NORMAL | TRANSIENT.

One of: string string, programSelectorUsageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
uselpacopy string | programSelectorUselpacopyAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, programSelectorUselpacopyAttribute object | object | object | object[]

sessionsSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS SESSIONS resources type.

sessionsSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of SESSIONS resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | sessionsSelectorNameAttribute

SESSIONS resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | sessionsSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
autoconnect string | sessionsSelectorAutoconnectAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ALL.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorAutoconnectAttribute object | object | object | object[]
buildchain string | sessionsSelectorBuildchainAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorBuildchainAttribute object | object | object | object[]
connection string | sessionsSelectorConnectionAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorConnectionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
discreq string | sessionsSelectorDiscreqAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorDiscreqAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ioarealen string | sessionsSelectorIoarealenAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 32767 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorIoarealenAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maximum string | sessionsSelectorMaximumAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 999 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorMaximumAttribute object | object | object | object[]
modename string | sessionsSelectorModenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorModenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
nepclass integer | sessionsSelectorNepclassAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorNepclassAttribute object | object | object | object[]
netnameq string | sessionsSelectorNetnameqAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#./-_%&¢?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorNetnameqAttribute object | object | object | object[]
protocol string | sessionsSelectorProtocolAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: APPC | LU61 | EXCI.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorProtocolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
receivecount integer | sessionsSelectorReceivecountAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 999.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorReceivecountAttribute object | object | object | object[]
receivepfx string | sessionsSelectorReceivepfxAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 2 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorReceivepfxAttribute object | object | object | object[]
receivesize integer | sessionsSelectorReceivesizeAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 30720.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorReceivesizeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
recovoption string | sessionsSelectorRecovoptionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SYSDEFAULT | CLEARCONV | RELEASESESS | UNCONDREL | NONE.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorRecovoptionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
relreq string | sessionsSelectorRelreqAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorRelreqAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sendcount integer | sessionsSelectorSendcountAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 999.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorSendcountAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sendpfx string | sessionsSelectorSendpfxAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 2 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorSendpfxAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sendsize integer | sessionsSelectorSendsizeAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 30720.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorSendsizeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sessname string | sessionsSelectorSessnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorSessnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
sesspriority integer | sessionsSelectorSesspriorityAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorSesspriorityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
userarealen integer | sessionsSelectorUserarealenAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

One of: integer integer, sessionsSelectorUserarealenAttribute object | object | object | object[]
userid string | sessionsSelectorUseridAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, sessionsSelectorUseridAttribute object | object | object | object[]

sessionsOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

autoconnect string | sessionsOverrideAutoconnectAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ALL.

One of: string string, sessionsOverrideAutoconnectAttribute object[]
buildchain string | sessionsOverrideBuildchainAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, sessionsOverrideBuildchainAttribute object[]
connection string | string | sessionsOverrideConnectionAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, sessionsOverrideConnectionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
discreq string | sessionsOverrideDiscreqAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, sessionsOverrideDiscreqAttribute object[]
ioarealen string | sessionsOverrideIoarealenAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 32767 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, sessionsOverrideIoarealenAttribute object[]
maximum string | sessionsOverrideMaximumAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 999 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, sessionsOverrideMaximumAttribute object[]
modename string | string | sessionsOverrideModenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

tcpipserviceSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TCPIPSERVICE resources type.

tcpipserviceSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TCPIPSERVICE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | tcpipserviceSelectorNameAttribute

TCPIPSERVICE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | tcpipserviceSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
attachsec string | tcpipserviceSelectorAttachsecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | VERIFY.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorAttachsecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authenticate string | tcpipserviceSelectorAuthenticateAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | BASIC | CERTIFICATE | AUTOREGISTER | AUTOMATIC.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorAuthenticateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
backlog integer | tcpipserviceSelectorBacklogAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, tcpipserviceSelectorBacklogAttribute object | object | object | object[]
certificate string | tcpipserviceSelectorCertificateAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorCertificateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ciphers string | tcpipserviceSelectorCiphersAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorCiphersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
host string | tcpipserviceSelectorHostAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 116 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorHostAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ipaddress string | tcpipserviceSelectorIpaddressAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 15 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorIpaddressAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maxdatalen integer | tcpipserviceSelectorMaxdatalenAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 3 to 524288.

One of: integer integer, tcpipserviceSelectorMaxdatalenAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maxpersist integer | string | tcpipserviceSelectorMaxpersistAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 0 to 65535.

One of: integer integer, string string, tcpipserviceSelectorMaxpersistAttribute object | object | object | object[]
optionspgm string | tcpipserviceSelectorOptionspgmAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorOptionspgmAttribute object | object | object | object[]
portnumber integer | tcpipserviceSelectorPortnumberAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 65535.

One of: integer integer, tcpipserviceSelectorPortnumberAttribute object | object | object | object[]
protocol string | tcpipserviceSelectorProtocolAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: HTTP | ECI | USER | IPIC.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorProtocolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
realm string | tcpipserviceSelectorRealmAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>¢+'() ]. A single wildcard character '' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorRealmAttribute object | object | object | object[]
socketclose integer | string | tcpipserviceSelectorSocketcloseAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a time interval (format hhmmss) in the range 0 to 240000.

One of: integer integer, string string, tcpipserviceSelectorSocketcloseAttribute object | object | object | object[]
speciftcps string | tcpipserviceSelectorSpeciftcpsAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorSpeciftcpsAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ssl string | tcpipserviceSelectorSslAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO" | CLIENTAUTH | ATTLSAWARE.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorSslAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | tcpipserviceSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: OPEN | CLOSED.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
transaction string | tcpipserviceSelectorTransactionAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorTransactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
urm string | tcpipserviceSelectorUrmAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tcpipserviceSelectorUrmAttribute object | object | object | object[]

tdqueueSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TDQUEUE resources type.

tdqueueSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TDQUEUE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | tdqueueSelectorNameAttribute

TDQUEUE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | tdqueueSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atifacility string | tdqueueSelectorAtifacilityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TERMINAL | FILE | SYSTEM.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorAtifacilityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
blockformat string | string | tdqueueSelectorBlockformatAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BLOCKED | UNBLOCKED or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, tdqueueSelectorBlockformatAttribute object | object | object | object[]
blocksize integer | tdqueueSelectorBlocksizeAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, tdqueueSelectorBlocksizeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
databuffers integer | tdqueueSelectorDatabuffersAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 255.

One of: integer integer, tdqueueSelectorDatabuffersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ddname string | tdqueueSelectorDdnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorDdnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
disposition string | tdqueueSelectorDispositionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SHR | OLD | MOD.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorDispositionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
dsname string | tdqueueSelectorDsnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 44 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#&.-%]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorDsnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
erroroption string | tdqueueSelectorErroroptionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: IGNORE | SKIP.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorErroroptionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
facilityid string | tdqueueSelectorFacilityidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#¢./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorFacilityidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
indirectname string | tdqueueSelectorIndirectnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tdqueueSelectorIndirectnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
jobuserid string | tdqueueSelectorJobuseridAttribute

tdqueueOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

atifacility string | tdqueueOverrideAtifacilityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: TERMINAL | FILE | SYSTEM.

One of: string string, tdqueueOverrideAtifacilityAttribute object[]
blockformat string | string | tdqueueOverrideBlockformatAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BLOCKED | UNBLOCKED or a null string "".

One of: string string, string string, tdqueueOverrideBlockformatAttribute object[]
blocksize integer | tdqueueOverrideBlocksizeAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, tdqueueOverrideBlocksizeAttribute object[]
databuffers integer | tdqueueOverrideDatabuffersAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 1 to 255.

One of: integer integer, tdqueueOverrideDatabuffersAttribute object[]
ddname string | string | tdqueueOverrideDdnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tdqueueOverrideDdnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
disposition string | tdqueueOverrideDispositionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SHR | OLD | MOD.

One of: string string, tdqueueOverrideDispositionAttribute object[]
dsname string | string | tdqueueOverrideDsnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 44 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#&.-%]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tdqueueOverrideDsnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
erroroption string | tdqueueOverrideErroroptionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: IGNORE | SKIP.

One of: string string, tdqueueOverrideErroroptionAttribute object[]
facilityid string | string | tdqueueOverrideFacilityidAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#¢./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tdqueueOverrideFacilityidAttribute object | object | object | object[]
indirectname string | string | tdqueueOverrideIndirectnameAttribute

terminalSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TERMINAL resources type.

terminalSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TERMINAL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | terminalSelectorNameAttribute

TERMINAL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | terminalSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
altprintcopy string | terminalSelectorAltprintcopyAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, terminalSelectorAltprintcopyAttribute object | object | object | object[]
altprinter string | terminalSelectorAltprinterAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorAltprinterAttribute object | object | object | object[]
attachsec string | terminalSelectorAttachsecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: LOCAL | IDENTIFY | VERIFY | PERSISTENT | MIXIDPE.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorAttachsecAttribute object | object | object | object[]
autinstmodel string | terminalSelectorAutinstmodelAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES" | ONLY.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorAutinstmodelAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorAutinstnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
bindsecurity string | terminalSelectorBindsecurityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, terminalSelectorBindsecurityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
consname string | terminalSelectorConsnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorConsnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
inservice string | terminalSelectorInserviceAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

One of: string string, terminalSelectorInserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
modename string | terminalSelectorModenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorModenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
natlang string | terminalSelectorNatlangAttribute

Specify a single character value from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorPoolAttribute object | object | object | object[]
printer string | terminalSelectorPrinterAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

solicited string | terminalSelectorSolicitedAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

tasklimit integer | string | terminalSelectorTasklimitAttribute

termpriority integer | terminalSelectorTermpriorityAttribute

transaction string | terminalSelectorTransactionAttribute

usedfltuser string | terminalSelectorUsedfltuserAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, terminalSelectorUsedfltuserAttribute object | object | object | object[]
userid string | terminalSelectorUseridAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#] or for autoinstalled consoles the special values *FIRST or EVERY. A single wildcard character '' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, terminalSelectorUseridAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, terminalOverrideRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]
securityname string | string | terminalOverrideSecuritynameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, terminalOverrideSecuritynameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
solicited string | terminalOverrideSolicitedAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, terminalOverrideSolicitedAttribute object[]
tasklimit integer | string | terminalOverrideTasklimitAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 32767.

One of: integer integer, string string, terminalOverrideTasklimitAttribute object[]
termpriority integer | terminalOverrideTermpriorityAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

One of: integer integer, terminalOverrideTermpriorityAttribute object[]
transaction string | string | terminalOverrideTransactionAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, terminalOverrideTransactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
typeterm string | string | terminalOverrideTypetermAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, terminalOverrideTypetermAttribute object | object | object | object[]
usedfltuser string | terminalOverrideUsedfltuserAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, terminalOverrideUsedfltuserAttribute object[]
userid string | string | terminalOverrideUseridAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#] or for autoinstalled consoles the special values *FIRST or *EVERY. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

tranclassSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TRANCLASS resources type.

tranclassSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TRANCLASS resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | tranclassSelectorNameAttribute

TRANCLASS resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tranclassSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | tranclassSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tranclassSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
maxactive integer | tranclassSelectorMaxactiveAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 999.

One of: integer integer, tranclassSelectorMaxactiveAttribute object | object | object | object[]
purgeaction string | tranclassSelectorPurgeactionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ABEND | DISCARD.

One of: string string, tranclassSelectorPurgeactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
purgethresh integer | string | tranclassSelectorPurgethreshAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 1000000.

One of: integer integer, string string, tranclassSelectorPurgethreshAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tranclassSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tranclassSelectorMaxactiveAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tranclassSelectorPurgeactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tranclassSelectorPurgethreshAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tranclassSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]

transactionSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TRANSACTION resources type.

transactionSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TRANSACTION resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | transactionSelectorNameAttribute

TRANSACTION resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, transactionSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | transactionSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, transactionSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
action string | transactionSelectorActionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BACKOUT | COMMIT.

One of: string string, transactionSelectorActionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
alias string | transactionSelectorAliasAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, transactionSelectorAliasAttribute object | object | object | object[]
brexit string | transactionSelectorBrexitAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

cmdsec string | transactionSelectorCmdsecAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, transactionSelectorCmdsecAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

Specify either the string "NO" or a time interval (format mmss) in the range 1 to 6800.

dump string | transactionSelectorDumpAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "YES" | "NO".

dynamic string | transactionSelectorDynamicAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

otelprop string | transactionSelectorOtelpropAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NOPROP | PROPONLY.

otstimeout integer | string | transactionSelectorOtstimeoutAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a time interval (format hhmmss) in the range 0 to 240000.

partitionset string | transactionSelectorPartitionsetAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, transactionSelectorPartitionsetAttribute object | object | object | object[]
priority integer | transactionSelectorPriorityAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 255.

profile string | transactionSelectorProfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

tpname string | transactionSelectorTpnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 64 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

xtpname string | transactionSelectorXtpnameAttribute

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

action string | transactionOverrideActionAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: BACKOUT | COMMIT.

alias string | string | transactionOverrideAliasAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

tsmodelSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS TSMODEL resources type.

tsmodelSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TSMODEL resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | tsmodelSelectorNameAttribute

TSMODEL resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | tsmodelSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
expiryintmin integer | tsmodelSelectorExpiryintminAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 900000.

One of: integer integer, tsmodelSelectorExpiryintminAttribute object | object | object | object[]
location string | tsmodelSelectorLocationAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: AUXILIARY | MAIN.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorLocationAttribute object | object | object | object[]
poolname string | tsmodelSelectorPoolnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#_]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorPoolnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
prefix string | tsmodelSelectorPrefixAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>+]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorPrefixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
recovery string | tsmodelSelectorRecoveryAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorRecoveryAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remoteprefix string | tsmodelSelectorRemoteprefixAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>+]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorRemoteprefixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesystem string | tsmodelSelectorRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]
security string | tsmodelSelectorSecurityAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorSecurityAttribute object | object | object | object[]
xprefix string | tsmodelSelectorXprefixAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorXprefixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
xremotepfx string | tsmodelSelectorXremotepfxAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, tsmodelSelectorXremotepfxAttribute object | object | object | object[]

tsmodelOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

expiryintmin integer | tsmodelOverrideExpiryintminAttribute

Specify a integer in the range 0 to 900000.

One of: integer integer, tsmodelOverrideExpiryintminAttribute object[]
location string | tsmodelOverrideLocationAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: AUXILIARY | MAIN.

One of: string string, tsmodelOverrideLocationAttribute object[]
poolname string | string | tsmodelOverridePoolnameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#_]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tsmodelOverridePoolnameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
prefix string | string | tsmodelOverridePrefixAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 16 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>+]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tsmodelOverridePrefixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
recovery string | tsmodelOverrideRecoveryAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, tsmodelOverrideRecoveryAttribute object[]
remoteprefix string | string | tsmodelOverrideRemoteprefixAttribute

One of: string string, string string, tsmodelOverrideRemoteprefixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
remotesystem string | string | tsmodelOverrideRemotesystemAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, tsmodelOverrideRemotesystemAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

CICS TYPETERM resources type.

typetermSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of TYPETERM resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | typetermSelectorNameAttribute

TYPETERM resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, typetermSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | typetermSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, typetermSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
altpage string | typetermSelectorAltpageAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 255 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, typetermSelectorAltpageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
altscreen string | typetermSelectorAltscreenAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 255 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, typetermSelectorAltscreenAttribute object | object | object | object[]
altsuffix string | typetermSelectorAltsuffixAttribute

Specify a single character value from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, typetermSelectorAltsuffixAttribute object | object | object | object[]
aplkybd string | typetermSelectorAplkybdAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

typetermOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

altpage string | typetermOverrideAltpageAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 255 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, typetermOverrideAltpageAttribute object[]
altscreen string | typetermOverrideAltscreenAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 255 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

One of: string string, typetermOverrideAltscreenAttribute object[]
altsuffix string | string | typetermOverrideAltsuffixAttribute

Specify a single character value from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, typetermOverrideAltsuffixAttribute object | object[]
aplkybd string | typetermOverrideAplkybdAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, typetermOverrideAplkybdAttribute object[]
apltext string | typetermOverrideApltextAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, typetermOverrideApltextAttribute object[]
ascii string | typetermOverrideAsciiAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | 7 | 8.

One of: string string, typetermOverrideAsciiAttribute object[]
ati string | typetermOverrideAtiAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

cgcsgid string | typetermOverrideCgcsgidAttribute

Specify two integers in the range 0 to 65535 separated by commas, i.e. nn,nn.

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

defscreen string | typetermOverrideDefscreenAttribute

device string | string | typetermOverrideDeviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

urimapSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS URIMAP resources type.

urimapSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of URIMAP resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | urimapSelectorNameAttribute

URIMAP resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | urimapSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
analyzer string | urimapSelectorAnalyzerAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, urimapSelectorAnalyzerAttribute object | object | object | object[]
atomservice string | urimapSelectorAtomserviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorAtomserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
attls string | urimapSelectorAttlsAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NOTAWARE | AWARE.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorAttlsAttribute object | object | object | object[]
authenticate string | urimapSelectorAuthenticateAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | BASIC.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorAuthenticateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
certificate string | urimapSelectorCertificateAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorCertificateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
characterset string | urimapSelectorCharactersetAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 40 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorCharactersetAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ciphers string | urimapSelectorCiphersAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorCiphersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
converter string | urimapSelectorConverterAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorConverterAttribute object | object | object | object[]
hfsfile string | urimapSelectorHfsfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorHfsfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
host string | urimapSelectorHostAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 116 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorHostAttribute object | object | object | object[]
hostcodepage string | urimapSelectorHostcodepageAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 10 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorHostcodepageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
location string | urimapSelectorLocationAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorLocationAttribute object | object | object | object[]
mediatype string | urimapSelectorMediatypeAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>+]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorMediatypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
path string | urimapSelectorPathAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorPathAttribute object | object | object | object[]
pipeline string | urimapSelectorPipelineAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorPipelineAttribute object | object | object | object[]
port integer | string | urimapSelectorPortAttribute

Specify either the string "NO" or a single integer in the range 1 to 65535.

One of: integer integer, string string, urimapSelectorPortAttribute object | object | object | object[]
program string | urimapSelectorProgramAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorProgramAttribute object | object | object | object[]
redirecttype string | urimapSelectorRedirecttypeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TEMPORARY | PERMANENT.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorRedirecttypeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
scheme string | urimapSelectorSchemeAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: HTTP | HTTPS | IIOP | JMS.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorSchemeAttribute object | object | object | object[]
socketclose integer | urimapSelectorSocketcloseAttribute

Specify a time interval (format hhmmss) in the range 0 to 240000.

One of: integer integer, urimapSelectorSocketcloseAttribute object | object | object | object[]
status string | urimapSelectorStatusAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: ENABLED | DISABLED.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorStatusAttribute object | object | object | object[]
tcpipservice string | urimapSelectorTcpipserviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorTcpipserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
templatename string | urimapSelectorTemplatenameAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 48 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorTemplatenameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
transaction string | urimapSelectorTransactionAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 4 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorTransactionAttribute object | object | object | object[]
usage string | urimapSelectorUsageAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: SERVER | CLIENT | PIPELINE | ATOM | JVMSERVER.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorUsageAttribute object | object | object | object[]
userid string | urimapSelectorUseridAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorUseridAttribute object | object | object | object[]
webservice string | urimapSelectorWebserviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, urimapSelectorWebserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]

urimapOverrides object

Use 'overrides' to specify how the attributes of a resource are overridden.

analyzer string | urimapOverrideAnalyzerAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, urimapOverrideAnalyzerAttribute object[]
atomservice string | string | urimapOverrideAtomserviceAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideAtomserviceAttribute object | object | object | object[]
attls string | urimapOverrideAttlsAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: NOTAWARE | AWARE.

One of: string string, urimapOverrideAttlsAttribute object[]
authenticate string | urimapOverrideAuthenticateAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | BASIC.

One of: string string, urimapOverrideAuthenticateAttribute object[]
certificate string | string | urimapOverrideCertificateAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 32 characters. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideCertificateAttribute object | object | object | object[]
characterset string | string | urimapOverrideCharactersetAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 40 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideCharactersetAttribute object | object | object | object[]
ciphers string | string | urimapOverrideCiphersAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 56 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideCiphersAttribute object | object | object | object[]
converter string | string | urimapOverrideConverterAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideConverterAttribute object | object | object | object[]
hfsfile string | string | urimapOverrideHfsfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. The value may end with a single wildcard character '*'. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideHfsfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
host string | string | urimapOverrideHostAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 116 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>] or a single wildcard character '*'. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

One of: string string, string string, urimapOverrideHostAttribute object | object | object | object[]

Specify a string of between 1 and 10 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. The value may end with a single wildcard character '*'. Any of the supported symbols can also be specified with the format "{{<symbol_name>}}" or "{{<symbol_name>[start:end | start::length]}}" where start, end and length are in range 0 thru 254.

Specify a value from the following list: NONE | TEMPORARY | PERMANENT.

Specify a value from the following list: HTTP | HTTPS | IIOP | JMS.

Specify a time interval (format hhmmss) in the range 0 to 240000.

webserviceSelectorOverrides object[]

CICS WEBSERVICE resources type.

webserviceSelector object

Use 'selector' to define the set of WEBSERVICE resources that are to have their attributes overridden.

name string | webserviceSelectorNameAttribute

WEBSERVICE resources can be selected by specifying a string or using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list items. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorNameAttribute object | object | object | object[]
group string | webserviceSelectorGroupAttribute

The RDO group name can be selected by specifying a string or by using the 'is', 'not', 'literal' and 'literalNot' list operators. Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorGroupAttribute object | object | object | object[]
archivefile string | webserviceSelectorArchivefileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorArchivefileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
pipeline string | webserviceSelectorPipelineAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 8 characters from the character set [A-Z0-9$@#]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorPipelineAttribute object | object | object | object[]
validation string | webserviceSelectorValidationAttribute

Specify a value from the following list: "NO" | "YES".

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorValidationAttribute object | object | object | object[]
wsbind string | webserviceSelectorWsbindAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorWsbindAttribute object | object | object | object[]
wsdlfile string | webserviceSelectorWsdlfileAttribute

Specify a string of between 1 and 255 characters from the character set [A-Za-z0-9$@#./-_%&?!:|"=¬,;<>]. A single wildcard character '*' can also be specified anywhere in the value.

One of: string string, webserviceSelectorWsdlfileAttribute object | object | object | object[]
